import { ErrorRouteComponent } from './route.cjs'; import { ErrorInfo } from 'react'; import * as React from 'react'; export declare function CatchBoundary(props: { getResetKey: () => number | string; children: React.ReactNode; errorComponent?: ErrorRouteComponent; onCatch?: (error: Error, errorInfo: ErrorInfo) => void; }): import("react/jsx-runtime").JSX.Element; export declare function ErrorComponent({ error }: { error: any; }): import("react/jsx-runtime").JSX.Element;
